{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206312121D3DCB16835D0D323A9"}"},"total":25287},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7139150643318883102","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过最好看的一本末世类的书了，其他的都没看下去，就是吧，作者有点短啊，这才看两天就有屎黄色按钮了，希望作者大大继续加油，五星好评奉上，不要骄傲自满哈[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662213129,"group_id":"7103353089607863296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4VzoLDVxyUqppn3wMHRbFw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f3370f3f7f314160ac092aedc696f371~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702301&x-signature=h4RfQU7ux4sR2Re6ghaVYJSjNII%3D","user_id":"118387124471812","user_name":"初雪~~~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"118387124471812","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103353089607863296","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间异能+囤物资+杀伐果断不圣母+建立势力）
“陈先生，您订购的一百份炸鸡全家桶送到了。”
“陈先生，您预订的一百份烤鸭送到了。”
“陈总，您订购的一万吨猪肉到了。”
被称为虚空君王的陈洛，靠着无人能比的苟之能力，熬死了所有幸存者，全世界除了怪物再无人类。
活着没有意思的陈洛找了坑把自己埋了。
不是活不下去，是陈洛不想活了。
醒了之后，陈洛惊讶的发现，自己重生回到了末世的一个月前，上辈子开辟的异能空间也跟随而来。
没说的，先囤十亿物资再说。
囤这么多干啥？陈洛表示这辈子想换个玩法，自己建个聚集地，当个老大玩玩，看能不能通关了这末日。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bd3ba95a90faf25981fd001ae91c906b","author":"恨年少无知","author_id":"","book_id":"7103353089607863296","book_name":"空间系老六，末世先囤一万吨猪肉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"20万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7103354893410566695","read_count":"199497","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1338528"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"645","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1f7db4c044cdc711c59fffe87c13ea60~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316281&x-signature=KoqQHS%2Fkv6E4PzOGFYAPXX5LTD0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"940830921070574","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.5869654e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206312121D3DCB16835D0D323A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":109,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":55869,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":245361},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7105003077153227550","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，说真的，我从神魔就开始追作者的书。作者不像其它书，前后矛盾，而且在不同的环境的人物设定都很好，而且不圣母，也不舔。剧情也很好，所以一直追作者的书。非常好看，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654262516,"group_id":"7103353089607863296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwo7WDG92t8hwkd4vSAOnQc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"111171597511","user_name":"爱吃家常南瓜饭的阿左"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111171597511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103353089607863296","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间异能+囤物资+杀伐果断不圣母+建立势力）

囤这么多干啥？陈洛表示这辈子想换个玩法，自己建个聚集地，当个老大玩玩，看能不能通关了这末日。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bd3ba95a90faf25981fd001ae91c906b","author":"恨年少无知","author_id":"","book_id":"7103353089607863296","book_name":"空间系老六，末世先囤一万吨猪肉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"20万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7103354893410566695","read_count":"199497","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1338528"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"645","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1f7db4c044cdc711c59fffe87c13ea60~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316281&x-signature=KoqQHS%2Fkv6E4PzOGFYAPXX5LTD0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"940830921070574","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.737928e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206312121D3DCB16835D0D323A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2737,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":88209},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1654299584,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7148339679803785996","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"纯爽文，法王这个角色给这本书加了很多分，不然真给不了5星，这个角色确实塑造的很好，法王一路朝狗首领努力的故事甚至比主角的故事要精彩，特别搞笑，这是一本轻小说，没有主线，跟我前面看过的一本有点像，但是这本明显要优于他，缺点也是有的，前期战力啊人设都是有点崩的，但你能感觉到作者也有越写越好，毒点也是相当多，但是还好不算很毒，说实话这本书在番茄的末世文里算好的，继续努力加油，这是本搞笑轻小说，纯爽文，主角不圣母，说杀就杀了，还行的其实，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664352693,"group_id":"7103353089607863296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你看我的时长就完了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3W2hTbtmNkyDwYTk0J4PKwLXwtSimNUrIZDXet8HLb/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/95d0eacdbdd841af811c825c6f075f6f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703035&x-signature=tahjh1IsItWJsZJEQaBIZ8LZYpc%3D","user_id":"3482866324875680","user_name":"小夫d"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3482866324875680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1680907652,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103353089607863296","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间异能+囤物资+杀伐果断不圣母+建立势力）
